production layout remains blocked.", "pageShell": "workspace" }, "kind": "nexus-workspace-layout-preset", "name": "Default Workspace Layout", "regions": { "bottom": [ "bottomBar" ], "floating": [ "floatingWindows", "commandPalette" ], "left": [ "leftSidebar"

remaining: No Chrome DevTools Protocol console/network event capture; only Chrome CLI DOM/screenshot.
Optional read-only Supabase daily-data audit remains separate.

qualityDistance.rationale: For current-system mapping, static + symbol + isolated HTTP + headless visual/DOM coverage is complete enough. Optional live data audit is outside current-system static/runtime map.
